title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build a calendar application using Google AI Studio without code. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations using Gemini's advanced reasoning capabilities.
writeup: This tutorial walks through building a calendar application in Google AI Studio without writing code. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations, using Gemini's reasoning capabilities to handle the parsing and structuring. It demonstrates a no-code workflow for turning unstructured itinerary information into scheduled events within a six-minute build.
